previous_findings_resolved.resolution: Fixed in a5d3363 — Gemini key moved from URL query string to x-goog-api-key header. Verified: grep for ?key=/\?api[_-]?key= in src/ and scripts/ returns only the explanatory comment, no live sink.

Fixed in a5d3363 — tokenize.ts now caps BPE input at MAX_TOKENIZE_CHARS (1M) and extrapolates from a prefix beyond that. Method flips to 'approx' with a flagged source string so callers can detect the cap.

verdict: PASS — no CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW findings. Production deploy block may be lifted.
